description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a single story and a flat roof, surrounded by landscaped outdoor spaces including a pool and garden. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The exterior combines white and gray walls with wooden accents, and the backyard includes a patio area with palm trees and a swimming pool. The front area has a driveway and a small green lawn, while the rear showcases a spacious terrace. The interior appears to be divided into distinct living, dining, and bedroom zones, with visible furniture and fixtures. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and a strong connection to outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and patio. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of white, gray, and wood tones.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the driveway, main entrance, and a portion of the living area with large windows.
description_view_1: This angled view shows the garden, palm trees, and the pool area, emphasizing the outdoor living space.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the expansive terrace, swimming pool, and backyard landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the garage, side garden, and additional access points to the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
